RebootTimeout.description:
Estimated time of a reboot during this step execution, in minutes.
Apply only if the reboot policy is Required.

RetryOnFailure.description:
Retry the test if this step fails, applicable only for default flow steps in PreTest, PreBoot, and RebootStation stages.
Number of retries is according to definition in test line, test suite, or project settings.

Owner.description:
The owner of the Test Step should in an e-mail format
This field is mandatory if Locked = true

Locked.description: If true, only the Owner or someone with Project Owner role can edit this test step.
